description: Implement a 'Staff Picks' feature for the Urban Electronics store by adding a boolean field labeled 'Staff Pick' (machine name: field_staff_pick) to the Product entity type (Default bundle). Configure the products 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' and 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' as the only staff picks. Display these items in a 'Staff Picks' block view (showing Title and Price, limited to 5 items) placed in the 'Sidebar' or 'Sidebar First' region of the homepage. Access the site at http://localhost using admin / Admin1234!.
